55.reason: [Error: Since top is 0-indexed, the maximum valid index is 99, so full should be a->top == 99.]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 0.2 , reason:  [Error: Since top is 0-indexed, the maximum valid index is 99, so full should be a->top == 99.]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 0.2 , reason:  [Error: The condition should be a->top == Maxsize-1 (i.e., 99) to indicate full, since top is the index of the last element. With top==100, the stack can hold 101 elements, exceeding the capacity of 100.]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.16666666666666666 , reason:  Incorrect full condition: maximum index is 99, so top==99 indicates full. top==100 is out-of-range.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.16666666666666666 , reason:  Logic error: If max capacity is 100, indices are 0-99. Top being 99 means full. Top being 100 means overflow has already occurred or it's checking for the next invalid slot. Usually full is top == MaxSize - 1.
